# Nuclear

> Nuclear is a free, open-source music player without ads or tracking. Search for any song or artist, build playlists, and start listening. Cross-platform (Windows, macOS, Linux), privacy-respecting, and AGPL licensed.

## Links

- [Home](https://nuclearplayer.com): Website
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/nukeop/nuclear): Source code
- [Discord](https://discord.gg/JqPjKxE): Community chat
- [Documentation](https://docs.nuclearplayer.com): Docs
